text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...How about this, then?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: No, that won't work.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer and I pass by the shopping mall on
our way back from an outing and spot an unusual
pair looking quite troubled.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hi, hiii! Whatcha two up to? Ooh, you must be
looking for a present for someone if you're
hanging out by the gift section!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Whoa?! Wh-what do you want?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
To help, I guess. You two look like you're in a
pickle, so I thought I'd lend a hand. I keep up with
all trends, so whaddya think? Want my help?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, please. I'm getting a headache trying to
think of something good.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Aww! So you both wanted to get Hayahide a lil'
something to celebrate her setting a new personal
best...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
And you bumped into each other because you
were thinking the same thing!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
The last thing we want is to get her the same gift,
so we figured it'd be easier to buy something
together.
choice_data_list: But you can't agree on what, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
For starters, can you both tell me what you were
planning to get?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
She likes bananas, so that's obviously the best
gift.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, going with what she likes is always a good
idea! So, what's the issue?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Now's "not the time," apparently.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Oh! I guess she's not really focusing on
bulking, huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
She's prolly in peak form right now since she just
got a PB, so it'd be pretty sucky if she bulked up
too much and got thrown off her groove.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: You're so considerate, Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
N-no! I just don't want her to waste her potential!
As long as the thought comes across, that'll be
enough.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: So yeah, I thought that black outfit'd be nice...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, I agree! It's so chic and mature. I bet it'd
look great on Hayahide.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: It's supposed to be a celebratory gift, though.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right! Guess you'd wanna get her something
brighter since we're trying to party things up.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But you can't object because there aren't any
other good gift options, huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Here I thought we couldn't agree on something
'cause of our different tastes, but now I see it's a
little more complex...
choice_data_list:
(How is she able to interpret what they're
saying with so little to work with?!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer keeps talking with them until they
finally find common ground.

text_block_list.name: Shop Staff
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much for your purchase!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Whew! All done! Hayahide'll love it, guaranteed!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah... She'll get plenty of use out of it, but...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...It still feels too generic.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I think it's a perfectly fine gift. I mean, you both
put so much thought into picking something just
for her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's been raving about this hair product
because of how effective it is, and it doesn't
affect race performance at all!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure all your feelings will come through loud
and clear when you give this to her!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Man, it sure feels good to help people out! All's
well that ends well, amirite?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Nah, I hardly did anything.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
They both wanted the same thing from the start,
and that was to make Hayahide happy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: All I did was help them see that!
choice_data_list: You've taught me a thing or two.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: All I did was help them see that!
choice_data_list: You've taught me a thing or two.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: You are so extra, I swear! You're gonna make me blush with all that flattery!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: But you know, you're pretty amazing yourself!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: You manage to keep me of all people focused and on track!
choice_data_list: I guess that means we're both awesome.
I guess that means we're both awesome.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yeah! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our conversation stays just as lively all the way
home.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Hearing that is pretty dope, not gonna lie. You're the one who's always teaching me stuff, after all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But if you really learned something from me,
maybe you should call me Ms. Palmer from now
on, like I'm a real teacher!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Gah! Never mind, forget it! There's no way I can
live up to a title like that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Hey, cut it out already!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Our banter keeps going all the way home.
